query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS integrations_tokens (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  access_token TEXT NOT NULL,
  refresh_token TEXT,
  expires_at BIGINT,
  scope TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  provider VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  access_token TEXT NOT NULL,

  expires_at BIGINT,

  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
